a.xlink:title: Sends a simple command and waits for OK/ERROR. Example: sendCommand("AT+JOIN");.

Sets the communication mode.
Performs a software reset (ATZ Command).
Performs a "Ping" activation by sending AT commands until OK is received. Handles the module's low-po...
Executes a factory reset returning the module to its factory state. Warning: This erases all written ...
Retrieves the active channel Sub-Band mask configurations.
Initiates a LoRaWAN Network Join procedure. This is a blocking function until the module fires an eve...
Switches the module into P2P RX listening mode.
Requests a Link Check MAC command on the next uplink.
Sends a single bit of information. Frame Type 0.
Sends a predefined LoRaWAN certification packet.
Transmits a payload through the LoRaWAN network. Blocks until the MAC layer confirms transmission (or...
Sends an Out-Of-Band (OOB) administrative message to the Sigfox Operator.
Transmits raw P2P data outside the LoRaWAN stack.
Sends raw hex payload bytes.
Sends standard ASCII string literal.
Forcibly sets the ABP frame counter value.
Enables or disables Adaptive Data Rate (ADR).
Sets the LoRaWAN Application EUI (JoinEUI).
Sets the LoRaWAN Application Key (AppKey).
Sets the Application Session Key (AppSKey) for ABP mode.
Sets the LoRaWAN operational frequency band.
Configures the module's baudrate (default is usually 9600).
Enters LoRaWAN certification mode.
Enables or disables specific sub-bands for regions supporting Channel Masks (e.g.,...
Sets the LoRaWAN device Class (A or C).
Configures the number of retries for Confirmed uplinks.
Sets the Data Rate (DR) of the module.
Sets the LoRaWAN Device Address (DevAddr) for ABP mode.
Sets the LoRaWAN Device EUI (DevEUI).
Sets the DevNonce manually.
Enables or disables the Duty Cycle limitation (EU regions mostly).
Sets the delay for the Join1 receive window.
Sets the delay for the Join2 receive window.
Sets the network type (Public vs Private).
Sets the LoRaWAN Network ID (NetID).
Sets the LoRaWAN Network Key (NwkKey).
Sets the Network Session Key (NwkSKey) for ABP mode.
Configures P2P MAC parameters bridging the LoRa modem.
Toggles Payload Encryption.
Configures the Ping Slot periodicity (Class B / Custom usage).
Toggles the use of the Public Key.
Configures the Radio TX Power for Sigfox.
Configures the Regional Macro-Channel (RC).
Configures fundamental parameters for RF testing.
Sets the delay for the RX1 receive window.
Sets the Data Rate (DR) specifically for the RX2 window.
Sets the delay for the RX2 receive window.
Sets the precise frequency for the RX2 window.
